Review_Content: Great lifting straps: Found these on sale, they typically go between $20-$30 at most places. These are a high quality brand of strap, that have padding for the wrist, and the material bites into the bar so it doesn't try to unravel. These give a really strong grip, especially for the various types of deadlifts, allowing you to take some of the load off of the forearms and even add some additional weight, while not sacrificing form.
They wear a christmas present.My grandson loves them

Lifting straps: I very very much like the lifting straps by gymreapers, they are quality made, much better then the off brand version I had, they are more comfortable and snug then any other straps I've used, my only complaint would be explain to new users how to verify setting them up for right and left hand. Maybe I missed a video somewhere, but my buddy was confused, but I personally love there product and haven't been dissatisfied yet! I have the belt also, I will continue to shop with gymreapers for quality products

Ah yes, my life is good: Haven't ever used straps before. A while ago I shattered my wrist so I got wrist braces to help aid. Quickly noticed anytime I try to pull a heavy bar, I.E. Deadlift, it would feel like my hand was coming off. Finally bought some of these and it's a world of difference. I mean, it's crazy how much more I can lift and feel comfortable about not injuring myself anymore, not to mention just increased stability all around. Great quality item and works exactly as intended if not better.

Side note - Gymshark Shipping beats out YoungLA by a mile. If you order Black Friday, go gymshark lol. YoungLA will say 4-5 days and it took about 13 days. Gymshark shipped my items in 2 days, even during Black Friday.

Lifting straps: Good feeling with these straps. Was able to hit some personal records in the gym on the first use. The pad inside that sits on your wrist is soft and comfortable when lifting heavy weight.
Quality product: My old straps finally broke and was in need of a new pair. These are by far better then my last pair. Quality material and extra padding makes it feel like they aren't even on.

The GREATEST Investment You Will Make for Your Gains.: When I tell you my lifts doubled, almost tripled just after one back day using GYMREAPER Lifting Straps, you wouldn't believe me. If you genuinely have any curious on how triple digit weights feel to lift, give these straps a buy and try.
Best Lifting Straps: Ordered some of these in order to get free shipping. I don't normally use lifting straps when I work out, but that has changed since I started giving these a try.
Second pair: Bought my first pair in October 2024 and was hooked on the brand. Bought second pair because I use my first so much I wore them out with typically wear and tear. These are the best
Second Time: This is my second time buying these straps. My pair were given as a gift to a gym friend who at time didn't have any so I gave them mine. Straps are good for my deadlift days
Good quality and fair price: This is my second pair (I lost the first) and I knew there was only one brand I could turn to. Solid built and long life will keep you coming back for more.

My very own first pair lifting straps and they're Gymrapers.: I've been using my friend's exact same pair for a little bit now, and I got tired of feeling like a bum so I purchased my own pair. They're well made, fast, and simple to use. Thank you.

Overall work as they should: The straps look nice and seem durable, however since they have no rigidity they bunch up a lot where the tag end goes through the loop when tightened up. Not a huge deal just something to note. Maybe it's just me lol

Great product: It's a nice tool to have in your lifting arsenal. I mainly use it for pulling moves to help target the back muscles a little better. It's good quality materials and very comfortable. Would highly recommend.

Weightlifting Straps: Bought these for my husband as he is borrowing my son's straps at the moment. Only negative thing is when I first ordered them back in November I had to contact Gymreapers because I had not received them. Gymreapers sent out another set of straps which I received on Tuesday just in time for Christmas. Thank you Gymreapers

Nice Straps: My leather straps finally ripped after 10 years of use. I grabbed a pair of Gym Reaper straps out of the lost and found box at my gym. Later I went to order another set of straps from the company that made my leather straps. Discovered it was gonna cost more for shipping (U.S. Company) then it was for the straps. Then I remembered the pair of straps I used from the lost and found box. Went to Gym Reapers website and ordered a pair. Shipping was cheap, they arrived on time and they seem to be as good as my old leather straps. The padding around the wrist is a bonus. Highly recommend .
Lifting gear: Gymreapers will always be my go to when it comes to lifting equipment. High quality and very durable.
Quality item: Good quality comes in a nice bag as well which is a nice touch, did get a slight rub on my left hand from where the padding ends.
Straps: I've tried them love the color the style and it works perfectly so far thanks so much !
Work Great: They are comfortable and feel great when lifting, help with the higher weights you would use switch grip on before.
Great product!: I really love gymreapers weight straps for dealifts! I love the gymreapers lever strap belt even more. Awesome stuff!!
Work Great: They are comfortable and feel great when lifting, help with the higher weights you would use switch grip on before.
Great lifting straps!: Been using lifting straps for awhile. These straps are superior to others I've used. 10/10 recommend!
Great straps for a great price: These do exactly what you need them to do everytime, no ruff edges or hard pressure spots. They are really nicely made and durable.
Strength training: The straps help me to get two or three more reps from each set. I'm not worried about my grip slipping.
Great straps: So far, they work exactly as intended. Not sure if I like the flipped logo on one hand but definitely just nitpicking. Would recommend to anyone unsure.
Just enough padding: Unlike some of the other wraps I have used, these have just enough padding to not cut into my wrist, but not too much to make them bulky. This is my second pair and love them.
Padded Straps: Outstanding materials and construction!! The straps are incredibly soft yet durable and the extra length provides for rock solid grip. Highly recommend this product!!
Comfortable to use: My trainer and I tried these straps last night for the first time and agreed they were very comfortable to use. Not too abrasive as others we have tried. Five stars.

Great app: I think they are great wrist straps and they really work and tend to get all that weight off your wrist. And instead make you not slip when working out so far great product and will definitely buy from here again
Massive back: These help isolate your back muscles so others aren't working as well like your forearms
Love it!: It was delivered pretty quickly, didnt expect it to show up so quickly. Love the color!
Nice: Padding is nice straps do what they're supposed to
5 stars: Great fit and comfortable
A+: great straps. I really like 'the feel' of these straps. super comfortable!
Nice material: Everything fits perfect and feels good
Not good: Been over 2 weeks and still haven't gotten them
Lifting belt: One of the best lifting belts I've owned. Love the fit and the functionality.
Lifting straps: Very comfortable and seems to be great material
Straps: There really nice helps alot on pull day
Good straps: Good staps but endless e marketing
I like them: I'm in love with the wraps
Great buy: 1st lifting straps I've bought and am very happy with them!
Perfect!!: Only pair you'll ever need!
Lifting Straps: Got these to use for heavy barbell RDLs and love them!
Straps: Yoooo straps are crazy!!! Definitely helping with the back growth
Lifting straps: Amazing product for how cheap they are, would recommend for anyone
Straps: There really nice helps alot on pull day
Good and strong: Had to replace my old ones, grabbed these, nice with the padding doesn't dig as bad!  Good quality
Great: Great quality straps worth the money and wait
